goal: Close two SEO backlog gaps on the meanings index pages: missing BreadcrumbList + ItemList structured data on both EN/TH indexes, and a TH-only FAQPage parity gap where the visible TH FAQ section had no matching JSON-LD
done: Static JSON-LD additions only — appended new @graph nodes to the existing inline <script type=application/ld+json> blocks on tarot-card-meanings/index.html and th/tarot-card-meanings/index.html. EN: +2 nodes (BreadcrumbList covering Home → Tarot Card Meanings; ItemList of the 5 suit pages with clean URLs and English suit titles). TH: +3 nodes (FAQPage with the 5 Thai FAQ questions matching the visible <details> blocks; BreadcrumbList with Thai labels and /th/ hrefs; ItemList of the 5 TH suit pages with Thai titles like 'ความหมายไพ่ถ้วย'). No JS infrastructure touched, no new injection slots, no other files. inLanguage format on new TH FAQPage uses bare 'th' matching the existing inline pattern in this file (not 'th-TH' which card-seo-schema.js uses for card pages)
verified: JSON.parse() succeeds on both extracted JSON-LD blocks via node -e
EN @graph @type list: WebSite, Organization, CollectionPage, FAQPage, BreadcrumbList, ItemList (6 nodes)
TH @graph @type list: WebSite, Organization, CollectionPage, FAQPage, BreadcrumbList, ItemList (6 nodes)
TH gained the FAQPage that EN already had (3 -> 6 nodes); EN went from 4 -> 6 nodes
notes: Static-only addition by user spec; no JS injection slot introduced for the index pages, matching the established inline-static pattern used by both indexes. ItemList url values use the clean /tarot-card-meanings/{slug} URLs that landed via earlier commits 7f74cbe (sitemap clean URLs) and f6c6853 (TH suit pages) — confirming the structured-data graph references resolve to real pages. inLanguage format inconsistency across the site still exists (card-seo-schema.js uses BCP-47 th-TH/en-US while suit-page.js and both index blocks use bare th/en) — this patch deliberately matches the index file's existing format rather than harmonizing across files, leaving site-wide harmonization as a separate backlog item. 157 lines added, 0 removed. EN +55 lines (2 new top-level @graph nodes), TH +102 lines (3 new nodes — TH bigger because the FAQPage block alone is ~50 lines).
